commit.subject: LU-16807 lnet: use flexible array members when possible
commit.message:
LU-16807 lnet: use flexible array members when possible

sanity-lnet/270 fails with UBSAN enabled.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Fixes: 124bc53a970 ("LU-18808 lnet: allow LNDs to discover metadata via pings")
Signed-off-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
Change-Id: I9e539d2fdf8966b79039ed18a9c2d640258d9a34

Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
